title: Buy CAPIT | Connect Wallet and Review Contract Details
description: Review wallet requirements, network details, contract information, fees, and transaction steps before you buy CAPIT.
headline: Buy CAPIT
body: CAPIT is accessed through a self-custody wallet flow. Review the network, contract details, expected fees, and risk disclosures before you proceed.

sections.heading: Before You Connect
sections.body: Make sure your wallet supports the required network, that you understand how token swaps work, and that you are ready to review the transaction in your wallet before signing. You do not need a wallet to browse CAPIT’s data. You only need one if you choose to connect or open the buy flow.

sections.heading: Review the Contract Details
sections.body: Before any handoff to a swap interface, CAPIT should display the following details in plain text.
bullets: Source repository: [Insert Repository URL or ‘Not yet published’]
Disclosure version: [Insert Date or Version ID]

sections.heading: Security Reminder
sections.body: CAPIT will never ask for your secret recovery phrase, private keys, or wallet password. If any page, prompt, or support message asks for them, stop immediately.

sections.heading: Transaction Flow
sections.body: Connect your wallet, confirm the network, review approvals, review the swap, submit the transaction, wait for confirmation, then view success or failure details. CAPIT cannot recover wallets or reverse blockchain transactions.

sections.heading: Error Messages
sections.body: Wallet missing: Wallet not found. Unsupported network: Switch to [Network]. Insufficient balance: Insufficient balance for the selected amount and network cost. User rejected: Transaction rejected in your wallet. Swap failed: Review details and try again.
